titleStmt.title: SII 15.188: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 188. (B.K. No. 114 of 1929-30.) SĀLAVĀḌIGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone standing near the Hanumān temple.

This is dated Śaka 1174, Virōdhakṛit, Śrāvaṇa-paurṇami, Sunday, eclipse, Saṅkrāṅti. The Śaka year was current. In this year a lunar eclipse occurred on Āśvayuja śu. 15, Sunday. Thus, if Śrāvaṇa is a mistake for Āśvayuja, the date corresponds to 1251 A.D., October 1. Otherwise the date would be irregular, for Śrāvaṇa śu. 15 fell on August 3 which was Thursday when there was no eclipse.

The king's subordinate Mahāpradhāna Chavuḍiseṭṭi is stated to have been governing the two Beḷuvalas, Banavāsi, Pāṇḍyanāḍu, Hānuṁgal, Kūṁḍi-nāḍu, Tardavāḍi and other provinces. The epigraph registers a series of land and other gifts to several individuals and deities whose names are specified. The gifts were made by Siripayya, son of Hariyaṇṇa of Hagaraṭṭage, of the Vāji family, who was the Kareṇa of Chavuḍiseṭṭi, and entrusted into the hands of the Uroḍēya of Sāḷavāḍige through Raṅgarasa of the Śilāhāra family, who was the maternal uncle of Chavuḍiseṭṭi and was in charge of Sāḷavāḍige, Bāgavāḍi and other villages.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷō
kya nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . ja
yatyāvikṣru(ṣkṛ)taṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitā
rṇavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnatadaṁṣṭrāgravi
śrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . svasti śrī śakava
rusada 1174 neya virōdhakritu saṁvatsara
da śrāvaṇa suddha paurṇnami yādivāra grahaṇa
saṁkrāṁti vyatīpāta puṇyadinaṁgaḷali [.]
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda dvārāvatīpurava
rādhīśvaraṁ viṣṇuvaṁsōdbhavaṁ suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ
yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāskaraṁ
yarirāyajagajhaṁpa māḷavarāyamadanatriṇē
tra gūrjjararāyabhayaṁkaraṁ teluṁgarāyastā
panācāryya yityādi nāmāvaḷīsamāḷaṁ
krita śrīmatpravuḍha pratāpacakravartti śrī
kahnaradēva vijayarājyōdayi tatpāda
padmōpajīvi samastarājyabharabhāra nirū
śrī manmahāpradhānaṁ rāyadaṁḍādhi
dhikāri cavuḍiseṭṭiyaru Eraḍuṁ
beḷuvala banavāsi pāṁḍyanāḍu hānuṁga
kūṁḍināḍu tarddhavāḍi mukhya halavuṁ dēśaṁ
gaḷaṁ duṣṭanigraha siṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdā
ḷuttamire yavara māva raṁgarasaru sāḷavā
ḍige bāgavāḍi mukhya halavuṁ grāmaṁgaḷanā
ḷuttirppalli cavuḍiseṭṭiyara śrīkaraṇa vā
jivaṁsalalāma hagaraṭṭageya hari
yaṇnaṁgaḷa magaṁ siripayyanu dharmmakathāpra
saṁgava māḍi sāḷavāḍigeya
modala vūroḍeyara kayali dhārāpūrvva
kavāgi sahiraṇyava koṭṭu siḷārakuḷatiḷa
ka ya mukhadarppaṇa gōvadēvassaraḷiya nere
voḍe gaṁḍa raṁgarsara kayyali biṭṭa vritti
ghēṇa bāciviḍiya ghaḷeyali dīkṣi
ta �yiṇnaṁgaḷige mattaru 4 lakhkhaṁṇnaṁgaḷiga mata
ru 4 rāmaṇnaṁgaḷige mattaru 4 sāvaṇnaṁgaḷi
ge mattaru 4 viṭhaṇnaṁgaḷige mattaru bhānudēvaṁga
ḷige mattaru 4 kēsavadēvaṁge mattaru 4 caṁdaṇnaṁge mattaru 4
gōviṁdadēvaṁge mattaru 4 yappaṇnaṁge mattaru 4 rudra
bhaṭṭara boṁmaṇnaṁge mattaru 4 bhāgaveya bommayaṁ
ge mattaru 4 jīkina siripaṁṇṇaṁge mattaru 4 mayi
na bommayaṁge mattaru 4 mādayaṁge mattaru 4 malli
yaṇnaṁge mattaru 4 yintu śrī gōpāladēva mahājanaṁ
gaḷige vritti 16 kaṁ mattaru 64 śrī gōpāladēvarige matta
ru 4 mēṭigoḷaga maggake caitradalli bēḷe paitrada
li bēḷe paḷige Eṇne seṭṭuga matta lakhu
maṇēśvaradēvarige mattaru 4 bhāskaradēvari
ge mattaru 4 yī dharmmavanu yarasugaḷū vūro
ḍeyarū pratipāḷisuvaru maṁgaḷamahā
śrī svadattaṁ vā paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharā saṣṭirvarusasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
ja(jā)yatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 15.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
